input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.1.1
            TITLE: the design event evaluates the engineering effort that went into the vehicle and how the

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.1.1: The Design Event evaluates the engineering effort that went into the vehicle and how the
S.4.1.1 The Design Event evaluates the engineering effort that went into the vehicle and how the 
engineering meets the intent of the market both in terms of vehicle performance and overall 
value.

final_answer: The Design Event evaluates the engineering effort that went into the vehicle and how the engineering meets the intent of the market both in terms of vehicle performance and overall value.
